overall.description: A stationary cinematic view of a medieval great hall resembling Hogwarts, with students dining at long wooden tables illuminated by hundreds of floating candles. The stone Gothic architecture features high vaulted ceilings and tall arched windows, creating a warm, magical atmosphere typical of high-fidelity game engine rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall dining chamber with house tables

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the dining hall from the center aisle, maintaining a fixed perspective on the students and architecture

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes eating and conversing at the left house table
student in dark robes dining with peers at the right house table

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination throughout the hall
red and gold lion crest banner hanging from the front table
long wooden banquet tables lined with food and dining students extending down the hall
tall Gothic stone walls with vertical columns and medieval masonry
tall arched stained glass windows set high in the stone walls

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand medieval dining hall filled with students seated at long wooden house tables. Hundreds of floating candles illuminate the Gothic stone architecture from above, while a Gryffindor banner hangs prominently on the nearest table. The scene remains unchanged throughout, capturing the ambient atmosphere of a magical school dinner setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a grand medieval dining hall, capturing the timeless and magical atmosphere of a student feast. It begins with a wide view of students seated at long wooden house tables, where the warm glow of hundreds of floating candles illuminates the intricate Gothic stone architecture. As the camera lingers, the focus settles on the ambient details of the room, such as a prominent Gryffindor banner hanging over the nearest table. The scene remains poised and still, allowing the flickering light and the scale of the vaulted ceilings to define the immersive environment.
